title: 3 Pairs Nitrile Rubber Palm Coated Safety Work Gloves, Fine Knitted Bright Orange Color Liner, Oil/Greasy Resistance Palm, Multi-Purpose Wse, Mechanic Work, DIY, Construction, Gardening (8/M)
features: 13 gauge knitted quality nylon liner for comfort and dexterity
Plam and fingers nitrile coating for oil/greasy resistance
Foam technology for coating softness and enhanced grip.
Size small, medium, large, X-large available.
description: Product Description Main Features: Multi-Function Nitrile work glove This is a multi-function nitrile rubber coated work glove. - 13 gauge orange nylon knitted liner for comfort and fit to hand shape - Palm foam nitrile coated for oil/greasy resistance and good abrasion. - Elastic cuff keeps the gloves safe on your wrists. Foam nitrile for better dexterity This is QEAR SAFETY special foam technology that: - the foam feature makes the gloves better dexterity. - the same time, it is still oil/greasy resistance nitrile palm Flexible and Abrasion This glove combines abrasion and flexibility. - This glove is good for light-weight job handling. - It's thin and fit-to-hand, thus offering the right finger- tip sensitivity that you feel what you re doing. - It's multi-function daily work glove. - Orange color for more visibility in working environment! - Full sizes available from size small to size X-large. Choose the right size, fit to your hands and make your jobs easier!
